subtitle: Free QR Code Generator - No Subscription
meta-description: Create professional vector QR codes 100% free with no subscription. Export high-resolution SVG and PNG with complete local privacy and no registration.
footer-privacy: Total Privacy: Your data and files never leave your browser.
donate-description: If QR Studio has been useful to you, please consider supporting its development with a voluntary donation.
donate-footer-text: You will be redirected securely to PayPal.
copy-error: Your browser does not support direct copying. Try downloading the PNG.
file-size-error: The file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
badge-no-expire: The QR code does not expire and is unlimited
badge-suggestion: Suggestions or requests? Send us a message
contact-placeholder-message: Tell us how we can improve or what feature you'd like to see...
